zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville於1197年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比時，他的父親Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby27歲，母親Isabel de Neville21歲。他於大約1218年與Joan Monmouth在英國達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1242年9月29日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville于1197年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比时，他的父亲Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby27岁，母亲Isabel de Neville21岁。他于大约1218年与Joan Monmouth在英国達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1242年9月29日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville was born in 1197, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby, was 27 and his mother, Isabel de Neville, was 21. He married Joan Monmouth about 1218, in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 September 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville est né en 1197, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Neville, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Monmouth environ 1218, à Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1218 in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England Joan Monmouth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1242 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England begraben.

ko.Raby-with-Keverstone, Staindrop, Durham,: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville(이)가 1197년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Neville(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1218년 영국 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤에서 Joan Monmouth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 9월 29일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville nasceu em 1197, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Neville, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Monmouth aproximadamente 1218, em Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Raby-with-Keverstone, Staindrop, Durham,: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville родился в 1197 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Neville, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Monmouth около 1218 г. в местности раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1242 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия.

Se casó con Joan Monmouth aproximadamente 1218, en Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1242, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra.
